Everyday care with human guidance

Everything you need to make senior care easier

Adult diapers, bed protectors, gloves, wet wipes and other essential supplies, with personal guidance and delivery coordination in Panama.

  • Personal guidance

Start with your situation

Tell us what you need today

You do not need to know a brand, size or product format before contacting us. Choose the situation closest to yours.

✓Diapers for a family memberI want to quote diapers for someone receiving care at home.→✓I do not know the sizeI need guidance on measuring and comparing size charts.→✓Care for someone in bedI am looking for diapers, underpads and hygiene supplies.→✓Monthly purchase planningI want to estimate quantities and prepare the next order.→✓Care home or facilityI need an institutional or volume quotation.→

Essential supplies

Options for different care routines

Availability is confirmed when you request a quote. Guidance considers mobility, size, change frequency and number of people.

01

Tab-style adult diapers

They may make assisted changes easier when a person remains in bed or has limited mobility.

Learn more →
02

Pull-up adult diapers

They are worn like underwear and may be practical for people with mobility.

Learn more →
03

Bed protectors

They help protect mattresses, chairs and other surfaces during daily care.

Learn more →
04

Gloves and wet wipes

Supporting supplies for hygiene, cleaning and changes.

Learn more →

Personal guidance

Choosing well starts with a few practical questions

Mobility, body measurements, change frequency and level of assistance are more useful than guessing a size. Our form organises this information and prepares a WhatsApp summary.

  • You can start even when the exact size is unknown.
  • Guidance is informational and does not replace professional assessment.
  • You may request a one-time purchase or plan recurring quantities.
Use the choosing guide

A simple process

From your need to a clear quotation

  1. 1

    Describe the situation

    Tell us who it is for, mobility, known size and delivery area.

  2. 2

    Review the details

    The team confirms formats and the information needed to quote.

  3. 3

    Organise the order

    Handle a one-time purchase or prepare a flexible monthly routine.

Less last-minute buying

Plan a monthly purchase without creating an automatic subscription

Estimate usage, add complementary supplies and leave room to change quantities or size before the next order.

Organise my monthly purchase

Support designed around care

Clarity before you buy

01

Since 2018

Supporting families, caregivers and care facilities in Panama.

02

Need-based support

The conversation starts with the real care routine, not a cold product list.

03

Confirmed quotation

Prices, formats and availability are validated before an order is completed.

04

Practical privacy

We request only information useful for guidance and quoting. We do not ask for medical records.

Step-by-step form

Prepare your quotation request

Step 1 of 3

  1. Basic details
  2. Need
  3. Frequency and summary
Basic details

Facility details

Need

Measure waist and hips in centimetres and keep both values. The exact chart will be checked against the available product.
Additional products
Frequency and summary

Review your summary

You can go back and edit any answer before opening WhatsApp.


    

  

    

  
FAQ
Frequently asked questions
Can I ask for help when I do not know the size?
Yes. Select that the size is unknown and follow a simple guide for measuring waist and hips. Size ranges vary by brand, so the specific chart must be checked before buying.
Do you quote supplies for care homes?
Yes. The institutional form organises sizes, quantities, frequency and delivery area.
Is the monthly plan an automatic subscription?
No. It is a way to estimate and organise recurring orders. The next order may be adjusted, postponed or cancelled.
Tell us what you need
We can help organise a one-time purchase, institutional quotation or flexible monthly plan.
Talk on WhatsApp
